PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then echo "ATOMIC COMMIT REMINDER: This commit must be a single logical change. If staged changes span multiple unrelated concerns (e.g., a new feature AND a docs fix AND a refactor), split them into separate commits. One fix, one feature, or one refactor per commit."; fi'
